what_i_built: integrated reaction engine + lifecycle states from competitor research
what_i_realized: ComposioHQ and Overstory have the best real engineering. Ruflo is mostly prompts. The SQLite mail system for inter-agent messaging is cleaner than file-based comms. The orchestrator-never-writes-code constraint prevents merge conflicts.
where_this_leads: build SQLite mail system for inter-agent messaging, add task decomposition (atomic vs composite routing), then the constraint that master only dispatches never codes
